scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/server build && corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/web build
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/server test && corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/shared test
scripts.check: corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm test
